title: Wire SeedFSAdapter into compost seed pipeline
description: Connect src/fs/adapters/SeedFSAdapter.ts to the compost seed flow. When CompostMill.saveSeed() is called, also instantiate SeedFSAdapter (if LiminalFS is available) and call adapter.saveSeed(). Follow the dual-write pattern from GalleryFSAdapter — write to both original SeedArchive and LiminalFS.
